## Tower Semiconductor flagged as potentially undervalued after photonics shipment milestone

A photonics shipment milestone at TSEM is a niche but high-value signal: silicon photonics is a critical enabler for next-generation AI interconnects, and demonstrated shipment progress — if confirmed at scale — could position TSEM as a differentiated foundry participant in the AI infrastructure stack beyond standard analog and RF services.

- Tower Semiconductor has reached a photonics shipment milestone described as potentially catalytic for the stock's valuation.
- The headline frames TSEM as possibly undervalued in the wake of this milestone.
- No shipment volumes, customer names, node specifications, or financial metrics appear in the headline.
- Source is a single editorial outlet (simplywall.st) at medium confidence.
- The photonics angle connects TSEM to AI infrastructure materials and advanced-packaging themes.
